name: twin
description: Twin — turn your scattered agent sessions into a portable operating-profile.

plugins.name: twin
plugins.description: Harvest your agent sessions across every harness on this machine and distill a portable operating-profile (AGENTS.md) — then keep it alive: update incrementally, audit it against its evidence, query it mid-task. Pure-markdown playbooks; the harness is the LLM, no API key.
